title: No More Nice Golems
description: Removes Poppys from the Iron Golems loot table.
body:
# Ever get tired of your iron farms filling up with Poppys?

Well worry no more as I have fixed your problem!

This simple Datapack removes Poppys from the Iron Golem loot table so you don't need those pesky sorters!

This pack is based off of [No Iron Golem Poppy Drops](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-golem-poppy-drops) which hasn't been updated for awhile.

# BEFORE

![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6dca1bf925483bfe83a6e0ecb35dd698879f83f.png)

# AFTER

![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4377aa254a047013142e023f2f901f49f0c16c8e.png)

Beautiful, innit?

## INSTALLATION GUIDE
  - Go to your saves folder located here on Windows:

```
C:\Users(your name)\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\saves
```

  - Put the zipped file in the data packs folder, and either restart your world or execute /reload
